content.en:
With the strength of Ye Tian's six-domain level controllers, they didn't dare to snatch this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit with Ye Tian, that was looking for death!

Among the Eternal Masters, every time they are worse than a domain level, their strength is much worse.

The Six-Domain-level Masters can even kill the weaker Four-Domain-level Controllers, and killing them can be instantaneous.

Soon, these Eternal Masters were gone.

Ye Tian didn't leave, but sat cross-legged here and began to refine the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, he wanted to see how effective this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit was.

Rumble!!!

With one swallow, the energy of the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit surged, refining his controlling body.

You must know that Ye Tian's life level is so powerful, and the body of control has also reached level four, so it is very difficult to improve the body of control, even if you want to improve a little, it will take a long time.

However, this time after refining this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, his controlling body was actually making rapid progress.

"It's such a powerful effect, no wonder these Eternal Masters are crazy, desperately trying to snatch the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit. Ye Tian muttered.

It's a pity that just this grown Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit is impossible to help Ye Tian raise his body of control from the fourth level to the fifth level.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had completely refined the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

According to his estimates, if he wanted to raise his body of control from level four to level five, he would need at least twenty Xuan Lei Golden Body Fruits.

This is also due to his own high life level, he has almost completely used the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, and it is relatively easy to improve, if it is replaced by someone else, I am afraid that he will have to have more than a hundred Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, so that he can hope to improve the body of control from the fourth level to the fifth level.

"Go find the other Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits!"

Ye Tian left and went to other places.

As for this Xuanlei Golden Body Tree, he was not interested in guarding it, it would take too long, and he didn't have the patience to wait.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to look for the Xuanlei Golden Body Tree in the Xuanlei Black Valley, but he secretly wrote down all the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit that had not been long before it really grew up, and when it was almost completed, he would snatch it again.

Before I knew it, the years of the Ten Thousand Realms had passed.

During these years, Ye Tian had snatched a total of eight Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, and his actions had angered many people.

Because, the average Eternal Controller will not snatch one or two at most and will not snatch it again, after all, no matter how much they rob, they will not be able to refine it.

The Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit is an opportunity for the eternal controller, and many strong people will not go too far.

But Ye Tian, in these years, he has snatched eight Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, and it seems that he will continue to snatch them, which is undoubtedly very excessive.

this day.

Some of the Eternal Masters were discussing how to deal with Ye Tian.

"Guys, the Infinite Master has gone too far, and we should teach him a lesson. "

"We're no match for him, how can we teach him a lesson?"

"Xuanlei Black Valley has the rules of Xuanlei Black Valley, and it is indeed inappropriate for him to do this. If he occupies a Xuanlei Golden Body Tree, even if it is announced that all the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits on that Xuanlei Golden Body Tree belong to him, we have no opinion. As long as he has patience to keep it, it doesn't hurt to give it all to him. But now, he is relying on his strength to snatch the newly grown Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, and we are guarding the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit for him. Therefore, I want to find a number of Eternal Masters above the Sixth Domain level to teach him a lesson. "

"Who to look for, I'm not familiar with such an eternal master. "

"Find the Gu Luo Controller, he is the Six-Domain Level Eternal Controller, and his strength should not be lower than that of the Endless Controller. "

"One is not enough, there are Tianxin controllers, Haiyu controllers, they are also six-domain level controllers. "

"Hehe, I know a more powerful being with a good temperament, I can ask him for help. "

"Who?"

"Eight-Domain Level Master, Fire Devouring Master!"

"The Fire Devouring Master, it turned out to be this one, if he made a move, I am afraid that he could easily crush the Endless Master. Well, let's all go and invite them. "

Immediately, these Eternal Masters went to ask for help.

After all, the relationship is good, and Ye Tian did this, they didn't have the opportunity to get the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, and under the request, those eternal controllers above the sixth domain level would come to negotiate even if they didn't fight with Ye Tian.

Soon, some of the Six Domains-level Eternal Masters agreed.

What made them even more excited was that the Fire Swallowing Controller also agreed.

......

Somewhere in the Black Valley of the Thunderbolt.

Ye Tian came to a Xuanlei Golden Body Tree nearby, and a Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit here was also about to ripen.

So he waited here.

Suddenly.

Airplanes!

The void twisted, and a figure walked out.

Six-Domain Master!

Ye Tian felt that the other party's strong man was almost not weaker than himself, so he looked over.

"I've seen the Guro Master!"

Some of the Eternal Masters who knew the Gulo Masters greeted each other.

Gu Luo nodded slightly, and immediately looked at Ye Tian.

"Endless Master, I heard that you have recently snatched a lot of the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit of the Eternal Master?" asked Gu Luo.

Ye Tian frowned and said, "Yes, what's the problem, but I'm not the only one doing this, the other eternal controllers are also scrambling, I'm just a little stronger, and I've just grabbed it." "

Gu Luo sighed and said: "Endless controllers, why bother, the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit can only be refined a few, and it is useless to refine more, so why fight with these weak controllers." Give me a face, and quit here. "

"What if I refuse?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Buzz Buzz!!

Three more six-domain level controllers appeared, namely Tianxin Controller, Haiyu Controller, and Thunder Star Controller.

All of a sudden, four six-domain level controllers appeared, and they showed a tendency to encircle.

Suddenly, those weak Eternal Masters retreated, ready to watch the excitement.

"Are you going to do anything with me?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Don't dare, it's just a matter of learning a thing or two, if the Endless Lord agrees to our advice, we can drink and talk and become friends. The Gulo Ruler said.

"I'm sorry, I refuse!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The life level of these six-domain level controllers is not high, and they can't absorb a few Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, so they won't be extremely eager for Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, so they are willing to be good people.

However, he is different, he can refine a lot of Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, so he is naturally unwilling to let go.

When he can't refine the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit anymore, he naturally won't snatch it.

But now, he won't give up the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

Rumble!!!

An extremely terrifying aura distorted time and space, and another figure emerged.

The Fire-Swallowing Master is here!

This is an eight-domain level master!

When the four Six-Domain-level Masters saw the Fire Swallowing Controller coming, they all said respectfully, "I've seen the Fire Swallowing Master. "

Ye Tian also looked over, but there was a hint of surprise on his face.

And the other party also looked at Ye Tian, and was immediately shocked.
